subcodes.first_line: O thou bird of the garden of supplication! That which thou hadst written to Mashhadi Husayn was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیر حدیقه ابتهال آنچه بجناب مشهدی حسین مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @growth of the Cause
